findings.message: base.yml interpolates ${APP_WIDGET_API_URL} for the app service, but APP_WIDGET_API_URL is not declared in .env.example. Because base.yml reaches every environment (dev, test, staging, prod all compose base.yml), this undeclared variable resolves to empty across the entire DEV->CI->STAGE->PROD chain, breaking env-var parity. There is no APP_WIDGET_API_URL entry in .env.example (nor a corresponding widget_api_url pydantic field in src/demo/config/settings.py).
findings.suggestion: Declare APP_WIDGET_API_URL in the FRAMEWORK-managed section of .env.example (e.g. APP_WIDGET_API_URL=) so the interpolation resolves in all environments, and add a corresponding widget_api_url field under the APP_ prefix in src/demo/config/settings.py if the app consumes it.
